segments.text: Blessed is he who considers the poor.
The Lord will deliver him in the time of trouble.
segments.speaker: God

footnotes: the poor: or, the weak, or, sick
in time of evil: Heb. in the day of evil

segments.text: The Lord will protect him and keep him alive;
he will be blessed in the land; you will not give him up to the will of his enemies.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: The Lord will sustain him on his sickbed;
in his illness you restore him to full health.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: As for me, I said, 'O Lord, be gracious to me; heal me, for I have sinned against you!'
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: My enemies say of me in malice,
'When will he die, and his name perish?'
segments.speaker: Enemies

segments.text: And when one comes to see me, he utters empty words,
while his heart gathers iniquity; when he goes out, he tells it abroad.
segments.speaker: Enemy

segments.text: All who hate me whisper together about me;
they imagine the worst for me.
segments.speaker: Enemies

footnotes: my hurt: Heb. evil to me

segments.text: They say,
'A deadly thing is poured out on him; he will not rise again from where he lies.'
segments.speaker: Enemies

footnotes: An evil disease: Heb. A thing of Belial

segments.text: Even my close friend in whom I trusted,
who ate my bread, has lifted his heel against me.
segments.speaker: David

footnotes: mine own familiar friend: Heb. the man of my peace

segments.text: But you, O Lord, be gracious to me, and raise me up, that I may repay them!
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: By this I know that you delight in me:
my enemy will not shout in triumph over me.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: But you have upheld me because of my integrity,
and set me in your presence forever.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Blessed be the Lord, the God of Israel, from everlasting to everlasting! Amen and Amen.
segments.speaker: David
